lore.shortDescription: Imbue a weapon with magical energy, granting it a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
lore.fullText: You touch a nonmagical weapon. Until the spell ends, that weapon becomes a magic weapon with a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls.
lore.higherLevel: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the bonus increases to +2. When you use a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the bonus increases to +3.
